name: Ayima Group AB (publ)
summary: Ayima Group AB (publ) operates as a digital marketing agency worldwide. The company offers software tools, which include Ayima Reporting Tool, Pulse, Appotate, Redirect Path, Page Insights, Updatable, and Query. It also provides search engine optimization technology, consultancy, and robust reporting; paid search management, paid social, and programmatic display campaigns; data analytics; and content marketing solutions, as well as web design and development. Ayima Group AB (publ) was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
